name: proc_creation_win_hktl_crackmapexec_powershell_obfuscation
raw_query: any where ((process.executable like~ ("*\\powershell.exe", "*\\pwsh.exe")) or (process.pe.original_file_name like~ ("PowerShell.EXE", "pwsh.dll"))) and (process.command_line like~ ("*join*split*", "*( $ShellId[1]+$ShellId[13]+'x')*", "*( $PSHome[*]+$PSHOME[*]+*", "*( $env:Public[13]+$env:Public[5]+'x')*", "*( $env:ComSpec[4,*,25]-Join'')*", "*[1,3]+'x'-Join'')*"))
